# PunyDust/Resources — manually-crafted loading screen files

Place platform-specific loading-screen files here.  
`release.sh` copies them into `Build/Resources/` before building, and
auto-generates the formats below that can be derived from the cover PNG.

## Automatically generated by release.sh (from Cover-11-Dust.png)

| File | Platform | Format |
|---|---|---|
| `loadpic.kla` | Commodore C64 | Koala multicolor image generated from the cover PNG |
| `ART.PI1` | Atari ST | 320×200, 16 colours (Degas PI1) |
| `screen16.iff` | MEGA65 | 320×200, 16 colours (IFF/ILBM) |
| `SCREEN.PNG` | MS-DOS | 320×200, 256 colours (PNG) |
| `SCREEN.SCR` / `SCREEN.PAL` / `SCREEN.BAS` | Amstrad CPC / Agon | CPC Mode-0 via martine |
| `SCRLOAD.COM` | ZX Spectrum +3 | Generated from the cover PNG via the local scrload helper |

## Manually created — place these files here and commit them

| File | Platform | How to create |
|---|---|---|
| `picplus4.mb` | Commodore Plus/4 | Paint in Multipaint, save as Botticelli .mb |
| `LPIC.SC2` | MSX | Paint in Multipaint, save as MSX Mode-2 .SC2 |
| `screen.bbc` | BBC Micro / Acorn Electron | Use [BBC Micro Image Converter](https://www.dfstudios.co.uk/software/bbc-micro-image-converter/) |
| `loader` | Commodore Amiga | Use `ifftool.sh -c image.png` (requires `vamos` + `/mnt/c/Source/Puny-BuildTools/s-pic`) |

If you want to replace the generated C64 loader manually, overwrite `loadpic.kla` here with a Koala Painter image before running `release.sh`.
